title: ticket-viewer wasm32 build compiles under profile-browser
detail: Validates that ticket-viewer-dioxus compiles for the wasm32 target with trunk's profile-browser feature set after restoring the wasm-only imports/bindings broken by commit 4bb0961 (dep_graph/page.rs, store.rs). Full trunk bundling + browser verification is separately blocked by an environment gap (empty memory-viewers/viewer-api CSS asset path).
